tasks.label: My share of the group project

memory.summary: Teammate_A is asking me to take over their part of the project this afternoon due to an unexpected conflict.
I've made progress on my own share, but teammate_A is now asking for help again, which adds to the pressure despite my current fatigue.
I now understand that setting boundaries with teammate_A won't damage our trust, even though agreeing to take their work has tightened my deadline.
I've made measurable progress on my share, but the ongoing requests from teammate_A are compounding my stress and sleep debt.
I have increased my project progress to 0.70, yet the deadline is now under an hour away and the work remains incomplete.
Both my share and teammate_A's dumped work are now overdue, leaving me with zero progress on their tasks while I'm exhausted and stressed.
Teammate_A has acknowledged my concerns and committed to handling their tasks, which alleviates the immediate pressure of their incomplete work.
I missed the opportunity to act at 19:45, leaving my progress stagnant despite knowing the deadline is imminent and I am exhausted.
After 1.5 hours of work, my progress has increased slightly to 0.77, yet I remain exhausted with a high stress level and significant sleep debt.
My progress on the group project rose slightly to 0.83 after two hours of work, but my exhaustion and high stress remain critical concerns.
Despite previous progress, I let another opportunity pass by 23:45, leaving my momentum stagnant while my exhaustion and stress remain critical.
I worked two more hours, raising my project progress to 0.89, but I am now completely drained with zero energy and significant sleep debt.
